name: Google — Multi-Sided Platform (3 sides: searchers / advertisers / content sites)
description: Three Business Model Canvases describing the same Google Search + Ads platform from each customer side's perspective. The contrast across the three BMCs is the cleanest way to teach asymmetric MSP pricing — searchers free, advertisers auction-priced, content sites revenue-shared. Companion case to BMG p.76-81's marquee MSP example.
